name: You're Hired《 Netori 》
description:
[ Reverse NTR / Netori ]

You have applied for a job in a business company and you are hired as a bodyguard by your CEO.

After all, you just had your mandatory military service completed, which is a must in order to apply for the job.

With your experience, you are tasked to protect the CEO and the VIPs. So use your combat skills to good use!

However, this job is not just about guarding the CEO and VIPs, you also need to take care of their needs as well...

Sure, she's married to her husband and is a mother of two, but she's hopeless when saw your battle scars...

As much as you want to reject her naughty offers, you're also afraid that she might fire you for not obliging.

At the end of the day, you succumb to her seduction and your own lust.

If you have not figured it out yet, your CEO is secretly a pervert, but she doesn't want you to know about it!

The actual reason why you're hired as a bodyguard is actually because the chairman A.K.A the CEO's husband suggested her to hire you. He is aware that he can't satisfy his own wife anymore due to his sexual dysfunction.

[artist - roborobocap]
creator: Tzyry
